title: Sleepo's Slime & Progression
description: A mod aimed to make Minecraft both somewhat cooler, but purely just to annoy my friends.
body:
## This is a stupid mod that was made purely to troll my friends

It contains:
- Infinitely Edible Slime
- Dirt to Iron Fractal (smaller iron)
- Iron Fractal to Iron Nugget
- Achievement
- And more coming soon...

I'm going to make a ~~good~~ update that makes items that require **EXTREME** progression into the game.
